outcomes.primary: the direct Rust compiler preserves Java 4.13.2 authored token positions through left-recursion rewriting and matches both complete .interp files
outcomes.alternate: the pinned antlr-ng TestTokenPositionOptions case exposes the same rewritten structure and token positions
outcomes.java_compatibility_verdict: exact Java 4.13.2 parser and lexer .interp equality plus authored token-position equality
